meaning: 1. to scheme together; 2. to conspire; 3. joint plan; 4. conspiracy
sentence: 两人共谋陷害了无辜的同事。
pinyin: Liǎng rén gòngmóu xiànhài le wúgū de tóngshì.
english: The two conspired to frame an innocent colleague.

pinyin: Tā xiàng chídào de kèrén zhìqiàn.
english: He apologized to the guests for being late.

pinyin: Tā duì xīngxiàng xué hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: She is very interested in astrology.

sentence: 他从小就患有癫痫，需要定期服药。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù huàn yǒu diānxián, xūyào dìngqī fúyào.
english: He has had epilepsy since childhood and needs to take medication regularly.

sentence: 她每周在学校教课三天。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu zài xuéxiào jiāokè sān tiān.
english: She teaches class at school three days a week.
